_provenance.purpose: Single source of truth linking each axiom in src/2_fv_core/Axioms/BG3Rules.lean to (a) the bg3.wiki page that documents the underlying mechanic and (b) the dice / damage-type constants that the axiom references. Edited by hand when an axiom changes; checked by tests/test_axiom_provenance.py to prevent the Lean axioms from silently drifting from the wiki.
_provenance.scope: Only axioms that reference numeric constants (dice, slot levels, ability checks). Axioms that purely encode rule shapes (e.g. concentration_uniqueness) are listed for traceability without numeric checks.

axioms.notes: 8d6 Fire, DEX save for half, 18m range, 4m radius AoE.
Reaction; 2d10 Fire on the attacker after taking damage.
1d6 Necrotic per hit, doubled on crit (the bug).
Structural rule, no numeric constants. The bug: casting a second concentration spell while concentrating on Haste applies Lethargic.
Structural rule. The Lean axiom intentionally drops the DC formula so the in-game oracle can probe whether BG3 uses INT (the bug) or the spellcasting ability (RAW).
